title: Prisma repository adapters, remove SQLite default path, idempotent seed
description: Implement application repository ports for Todo and ActivityFeedItem in infrastructure using Prisma; replace better-sqlite3-backed persistence as the default application path for todos per architecture-brief. Provide an idempotent seed (prisma db seed via package.json prisma.seed or npm run db:seed) that loads deterministic todos, activity feed items, and optional stub user rows for QA/STITCH_BASELINE_UI. Obtain PrismaClient via factory/createDb(env) per brief singleton policy—no mutable global singleton.
acceptance: Infrastructure implements Todo and ActivityFeedItem repositories mapping domain/application types to Prisma models; application layer depends only on ports, not Prisma.

Runtime todo persistence uses PostgreSQL via Prisma; better-sqlite3 is removed from the default path or isolated to documented legacy/tests only if brief allows (goal: single credible path per brief).
Seed script is idempotent (safe to run twice without duplicate logical rows or with documented upsert keys) and documented in README quickstart: compose up, migrate, seed.
Seed populates todos and activity feed items sufficient for Dashboard, Activity Feed route, and E2E empty/happy paths per MVP.
Unit tests for domain/application remain green; new adapter code is covered under integration scope where exercised.
Integration tests for repositories run only in containerized jobs with test DATABASE_URL per testing skill.
